description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image and runs an apt-get update and install of build-essential and libgtk-3-dev in a before_script. Define a single stage called cargo-test. Add a job named brewstillery in the cargo-test stage that executes "rustc --version && cargo --version" followed by "cargo test --all --verbose". No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are needed.
